title: templar
summary:
incenτivised inτerneτ-wide τraining 
 Documentation Miner Validator emplar is a decentralized training framework that enables large-scale model training across heterogeneous compute resources over the internet. By connecting diverse computational nodes through a carefully designed incentive mechanism, emplar makes it possible to train large models collaboratively while ensuring honest participation and quality contributions.
